parameters.features: K, V at '=' position, text embeddings

key_finding: WRRA underpowered (0.15% arithmetic error rate — near-zero). BUT computation-position probes show V R=0.975, K R=0.961, text R=0.108. KV-text gap +0.85 at computation positions (~10x general position gap). V>K at all layers.
evidence_impact: Strengthens Phase 2 natural usage evidence with computation-specific decodability. WRRA approach blocked by model's near-perfect arithmetic.
next_planned: Cross-model computation-position probes on Mistral. Or try WRRA with plain text arithmetic (no calculator format).

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: CROSS-MODEL + COMPUTATION-POSITION: KV > text at all CoT positions (2 models). KV >> text at arithmetic positions (V R=0.975 vs text R=0.108). WRRA blocked by near-zero error rate.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: 2 families (Qwen, Mistral) for general; 1 family (Qwen) for computation-position.
